newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. FY25 results (revenue EUR105m, -11%) were March 11; the PTM (Photonic Transport Modular) DCI roadmap, SASE push and Orange 800G/757km demo were already disclosed. Nothing new since the prior case.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling/networking lens: optical transport + emerging PTM DCI line keep a thin scaling-infrastructure tie, but revenue is shrinking and the DCI product won't commercialize until end-2026. No new info since June 9; -6.6% is flow. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: PTM DCI transponder line (end-2026 launch) plus SASE expansion under the Bridge plan.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Sub-$100M micro-cap with declining revenue (-11% FY25) and execution risk on unproven new lines.
verdicts.bull: DCI-focused PTM platform and 800G demos position a tiny optical name for AI interconnect demand.
verdicts.neutral: Real but distant DCI exposure; current numbers contracting, scaling fit is peripheral.
verdicts.bear: Falling revenue, micro-cap liquidity, and DCI revenue not landing until late 2026 leave the thesis speculative.
